title: Track Global Events in Real Time With AI
titles: Track Global Events in Real Time With AI
Ditch 20 Tabs: The AI World Intelligence Tool
Monitor Global News and Flights on One AI Dashboard
description: Stop juggling dozens of open tabs just to follow critical global events and flight data. This open-source AI dashboard brings geopolitical news, infrastructure tracking, and real-time monitoring into a unified visual interface. Explore the repository here: http://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
